Subject:

Public Health Reporting Communication: Submitted report had no identifiable reporting needs.

Summary:

Your organization electronically submitted an initial case report to determine if reporting to public health is needed for a patient

A determination of reportability for a triggered condition could not be made. This may be because it is not on the list of reportable conditions for the relevant Public Health Agency, or the information provided at the time of this report does not meet reporting criteria, or not all data needed to confirm reportability were available.
